name: PriorityPlugin
description: Plugin to handle Signal Request Messages and place priority requests.

configuration.description: The log level for this plugin.
The IPv4 address of the destination Traffic Signal Controller (TSC).
The destination port on the Traffic Signal Controller (TSC) for SNMP communication.
The SNMP Community used for sending SNMP NTCIP communication to Traffic Signal Controller (TSC).
The default NTCIP 1211 priorityRequestVehicleClassLevel (1..10). 1=highest precedence within class, 10=lowest.
The default NTCIP 1211 priorityRequestServiceStrategyNumber (1..255) sent with each priority request. Priority Request Generator (PRG) shall never set 0.
The priorityRequestTimeOfServiceDesired (TSD) (1..65535). Desired time in seconds to arrive at the intersection's stopping point, relative to the receipt of the message.
The priorityRequestTimeOfEstimatedDeparture (TED) (1..65535). Estimated time in seconds to clear the intersection, relative to the receipt of the message.
